Description

The Menzerna Orbital Wool Pads removes fast scratches, sanding marks and surface defects in combination with Menzerna Heavy Cut polishes. The Premium Orbital Wool Pads are high-quality abrasive wool pads with a foam interface. The short-haired wool is especially suitable for scratch removal with orbital buffing machines.

## ABOUT

The Detail Depot simply embraces our love for all things automotive and the joy of owning and maintaining them. We want to bring the best products available to our Customer here in New Zealand.
We are currently NZ’s official distributors for CarPro, Nanolex and Dodo Juice. Detail Depot is an online-only store based in Wellington. We are currently working on our first store location in Wellington, coming soon!
